global_summary: This week needs 58 work-days company-wide; only 11 earned so far, leaving every project behind pace. All nine missed last week (Jul 13-19). Push inspections and trims by Sun Jul 26 or more work slips into August.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Slip: 57%, behind this week's single work-day. Book the final building inspection (due Mon Jul 20, now overdue) to salvage the week.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Slip: 79% of the month plan (3.0 of 14.0 expected work-days done; 2/12 tasks). To recover: finish ELECTRICAL TRIM: INSTALL NEW CEILING FAN by Fri Jul 24.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Slip: 58%, behind with 16 of 54 expected work-days done. Start waterproofing and tile install this week to stop the slide.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Slip: 40%, behind with 29 of 50 expected work-days done. Knock out the pulled-in plumbing and mechanical trim plus tile corrections this week.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Slip: 38%, behind with 30 of 54 expected work-days done. Get MEP rough-in city inspections moving so framing and insulation don't slide further.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: Slip: 40%, savable with 5 of 9 due work-days earned. Finish countertops, electrical trim, baseboards and cleaning by Fri Jul 24.

22PGVNmUgLww.text: Slip: 19%, slightly behind but best-positioned. Start siding by Thu Jul 23 and insulation by Fri Jul 24 to hold the week.
